description: Knowledge-cutoff registry for model-specific benchmark runs. A real-world case 'counts' for a model only when its disclosure horizon (min of realWorld.disclosure dates) is strictly after the model's knowledgeCutoff. Cutoffs must come from the official model card / vendor documentation. Entries with "verified": false are best-effort estimates and MUST be confirmed against the vendor model card before being used for published results. Resolve via run.py --model <id|alias>.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
